features.name: docs-migration-managed-docs
features.summary: Bootstrap docs migration is clearly defined and low risk for Phase 0 execution.

features.name: governed-project-memory
features.summary: Clear user value and zero external dependencies; reuses existing artifact harvest and context-injection machinery. Detailed acceptance criteria and ledger schema are deferred to the plan step, but roadmap-level scope is crisp and the no-semantic-store constraint bounds effort.
